text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump: The Iranian leadership has forced hundreds of Ships toward the United States, mostly Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to get their Oil — Thank you very much! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness

Trump: I’m winning a War, BY A LOT, things are going very well, our Military has been amazing and, if you read the Fake News, like The Failing New York Times, the absolutely horrendous and disgusting Wall Street Journal, or the now almost defunct, fortunately, Washington Post, you would actually think we are losing the War. The enemy is confused, because they get these same Media “reports,” and yet they realize their Navy has been completely wiped out, their Air Force has gone onto darker runways, they have no Anti Missile or Anti Airplane Equipment, their former leaders are mostly gone (This has been, in addition to everything else, Regime Change!), and perhaps, most important of all, THE BLOCKADE, which we will not take off until there is a “DEAL,” is absolutely destroying Iran. They are losing $500 Million Dollars a day, an unsustainable number, even in the short run. The Anti-America Fake News Media is rooting for Iran to win, but it’s not going to happen, because I’m in charge! Just like these unpatriotic people used every ounce of their limited strength to fight me in the Election, they continue to do so with Iran. The result will be the same — It already is!
Open Source Intel Report: Trump administration to ask Lebanon to repeal the law criminalizing contact with Israel. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报报告：特朗普政府将要求黎巴嫩废除将与以色列接触定为犯罪的法律。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @avivector : Today, two Tu-22M3 from Soltsy Air Base, escorted by two Su-35S, conducted a 4-hour training flight over the Baltic Sea and approached Danish airspace. In the area of the island of Bornholm, the group was intercepted by a scrambled pair of Royal Danish Air Force F-35A from Skrydstrup Air Base. In the area of the island of Gotland, the group was intercepted by a scrambled pair of Swedish Air Force Quick Reaction Alert JAS 39 Gripen. Yesterday, two Tu-22M3 (one of which is RF-94149, Red 15) were redeployed from Olenya Air Base to Soltsy Air Base to take part in today’s training mission. One of the two Su-35S from Petrozavodsk Airport was RF-81717, Red 50, from the 159th Guards Fighter Aviation Regiment. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @avivector：今天，两架从索尔齐空军基地起飞的图-22M3轰炸机在两架苏-35S战斗机的护航下，在波罗的海上空进行了4小时的训练飞行，并接近丹麦领空。在博恩霍尔姆岛附近区域，该编队被丹麦皇家空军从斯克吕斯特鲁普空军基地紧急起飞的一对F-35A战斗机拦截。在哥特兰岛附近区域，该编队被瑞典空军紧急反应警报的一对JAS 39“鹰狮”战斗机拦截。昨天，两架图-22M3（其中一架为RF-94149，红色15号）从奥列尼亚空军基地重新部署到索尔齐空军基地，以参加今天的训练任务。两架苏-35S中的一架来自彼得罗扎沃茨克机场，编号为RF-81717，红色50号，隶属于第159近卫战斗机航空团。推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Quds Force Commander Esmail Qaani reportedly was in Baghdad yesterday. He met with leaders of multiple armed factions to coordinate for a potential new round of fighting and pushed for the election of a pro-Iran prime minister. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046289737321955585/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据报道，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队“圣城旅”指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼昨天在巴格达。他会见了多个武装派系的领导人，以协调可能的新一轮战斗，并推动选举一位亲伊朗的总理。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046289737321955585/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Large-scale pollution has been recorded in Tuapse following drone strikes on the oil refinery. A major oil spill has also occurred, with an oil slick approximately 7 km long forming in the sea near the coast. The facility continues to burn. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046289319326097441/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：图阿普谢炼油厂遭无人机袭击后，当地记录到大规模污染。此外还发生了严重的石油泄漏，在海岸附近的海面上形成了约7公里长的油膜。该设施仍在燃烧。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046289319326097441/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 Iranian Quds Force commander, Esmail Qaani, who had not been seen since the Iran war began, has visited Baghdad in recent days to coordinate with Iran-aligned militias ahead of possible renewed fighting with the U.S. and Israel, Kan News reports. ➡️ According to an Iraqi political source, the visit aimed to align these groups and ensure they are prepared if negotiations fail. ➡️ Qaani also worked to influence the selection of a prime minister favorable to Tehran. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 据Kan新闻报道，自伊朗战争开始以来一直未露面的伊朗“圣城旅”指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼近日访问了巴格达，以便在可能与美国和以色列重新爆发战斗之前与伊朗支持的民兵组织进行协调。➡️ 据一位伊拉克政治消息人士称，此次访问旨在协调这些组织，并确保他们在谈判失败时做好准备。➡️ 卡尼还致力于影响对德黑兰有利的总理人选。推文

text: Visioner Will the second round of strikes against Iran begin? https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046287742217400497/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner：针对伊朗的第二轮打击会开始吗？https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046287742217400497/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran says it will dispatch negotiators to Islamabad on Tuesday for round two of talks with the U.S., according to the Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据《华尔街日报》报道，伊朗表示将于周二派遣谈判代表前往伊斯兰堡，进行与美国的第二轮会谈。推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - EU, UN and World Bank release "Gaza Rapid Damage and Needs Assessment," estimating that Gaza requires $71.4 billion for recovery and reconstruction work in the next decade. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046284397607882772/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：最新消息——欧盟、联合国和世界银行发布了《加沙快速损害与需求评估》，估计加沙在未来十年内需要714亿美元用于恢复和重建工作。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046284397607882772/photo/1 推文

text: Israel is buying 12,000 FPV combat drones in a new tender, upgrading from a cheaper 2025 purchase of 5,000 units. The new drones are far more expensive but include better features (like night capability) and stricter requirements for Israeli-made, non-Chinese components. Source: JPost
text_zh: 以色列正在一项新的招标中购买12,000架FPV战斗无人机，这是在2025年以更低价格购买5,000架基础上的升级。新无人机价格昂贵得多，但包含更好的功能（如夜视能力），并对以色列制造的非中国组件有更严格的要求。来源：耶路撒冷邮报

text: Germany is redirecting parts of its struggling industrial base—especially automotive suppliers—into defense production. Facing stagnation and rising competition (notably from China), Berlin is pushing factories, workers, and expertise toward weapons manufacturing. Firms like Rheinmetall are expanding rapidly, and auto suppliers are partnering on drones, ammunition, and military systems. The goal is to turn economic weakness into strength by making Germany a central hub for Europe’s rearmament. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 德国正在将其陷入困境的工业基础（尤其是汽车供应商）的部分产能转向国防生产。面对停滞和日益激烈的竞争（特别是来自中国的竞争），柏林正在推动工厂、工人和专业技术转向武器制造。莱茵金属等公司正在迅速扩张，汽车供应商也在无人机、弹药和军事系统方面开展合作。其目标是通过使德国成为欧洲重整军备的中心枢纽，将经济弱点转化为优势。来源：华尔街日报

text: Russian Geran-2 (Shahed-type) drone hit the home of Ukrainian defense Adviser Serhii “Flash” Beskrestnov. The house was destroyed, and he was injured but survived. He says multiple drones were sent and believes it was a deliberate assassination attempt.
text_zh: 俄罗斯“天竺葵-2”（Geran-2，沙赫德型）无人机击中了乌克兰国防顾问谢尔希·“Flash”·贝斯克雷斯特诺夫（Serhii “Flash” Beskrestnov）的家。房屋被毁，他本人受伤但幸存。他表示当时有多架无人机袭来，并认为这是一次蓄意的暗杀企图。

text: Macron will visit Greece on April 24–25 to renew a defence agreement between the two countries for another five years, with automatic extensions after that. The pact, first signed in 2021, commits both nations to support each other if attacked and included Greece buying French frigates and Dassault Rafale jets. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 马克龙将于4月24日至25日访问希腊，以将两国间的防务协议续签五年，此后将自动延期。该协议于2021年首次签署，承诺两国在遭受攻击时相互支持，其中包括希腊购买法国护卫舰和达索阵风战斗机。来源：路透社

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 The United States has reportedly suspended all funding and security coordination with the Iraqi government and has halted dollar shipments to Iraq's central banking system, according to Saudi channel Al-Hadath. Washington says the suspension will remain in effect until a new Iraqi government is formed and Baghdad provides information on pro-Iranian militia members who have attacked U.S. targets in Iraq. Iraq's economy is 90% dependent on oil revenue paid in dollars into a Federal Reserve account in New York. Every month, Baghdad flies in $1-2 billion in cash from that account to pay salaries and conduct government functions. Cutting dollar access means the Iraqi government cannot operate—salaries go unpaid, the dinar collapses, and the state grinds to a halt. Iraq is currently forming a new government after November 2025 elections. The U.S. threatened in January to suspend engagement if any of 58 pro-Iranian MPs were included in the cabinet. Now Trump is enforcing that ultimatum while Iraq remains paralyzed between Washington and Tehran. Washington invaded Iraq, destroyed its economy, controls its oil revenue through the New York Fed, and is now starving the government until it picks a cabinet the White House approves. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 据沙特Al-Hadath频道报道，据称美国已暂停与伊拉克政府的所有资金和安全协调，并停止了向伊拉克中央银行系统运送美元。华盛顿表示，在伊拉克新政府成立且巴格达提供有关袭击伊拉克境内美国目标的亲伊朗民兵成员的信息之前，该暂停措施将持续有效。伊拉克经济90%依赖于存入纽约联邦储备银行账户的石油收入。巴格达每月从该账户空运10亿至20亿美元现金，用于支付工资和维持政府职能。切断美元获取渠道意味着伊拉克政府无法运作——工资无法发放，第纳尔崩溃，国家陷入瘫痪。伊拉克目前正在2025年11月选举后组建新政府。美国曾在1月份威胁称，如果内阁中包含58名亲伊朗议员中的任何一人，将暂停接触。现在，特朗普正在执行这一最后通牒，而伊拉克在华盛顿和德黑兰之间陷入瘫痪。华盛顿入侵了伊拉克，摧毁了其经济，通过纽约联储控制了其石油收入，现在又在通过切断资金来迫使政府选择白宫批准的内阁。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The Democrats are doing everything possible to hurt the very strong position we are in with respect to Iran. Despite World War I lasting 4 years, 3 months, and 14 days, World War II lasting 6 years and 1 day, the Korean War lasting 3 years, 1 month, and 2 days, the Vietnam War lasting 19 years, 5 months, and 29 days, and Iraq lasting 8 years, 8 months, and 28 days, they like to say that I promised 6 weeks to defeat Iran, and actually, from the Military standpoint, it was far faster than that, but I’m not going to let them rush the United States into making a Deal that is not as good as it could have been. I read the Fake News saying that I am under “pressure” to make a Deal. THIS IS NOT TRUE! I am under no pressure whatsoever, although, it will all happen, relatively quickly! Time is not my adversary, the only thing that matters is that we finally, after 47 years, straighten out the MESS that other Presidents let happen because they didn’t have the Courage or Foresight to do what had to be done with respect to Iran. We’re in it, and it will be done RIGHT, and we won’t let the Weak and Pathetic Democrats, TRAITORS ALL, who for years have been talking about the Dangers of Iran, and that something has to be done, but now, since I’m the one doing it, belittle the accomplishments of our Military and the Trump Administration. This is being perfectly executed, on the scale of Venezuela, just a bigger, more complex operation. The result will be the same. In my First Term, I built the Greatest Military our Country has ever seen, including adding Space Force. In my Second Term, I am properly and judiciously using our Military to solve problems left to us by others of far less understanding or competence. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
text_zh: 特朗普：民主党人正在尽一切可能破坏我们在伊朗问题上所处的非常有利的地位。尽管第一次世界大战持续了4年3个月零14天，第二次世界大战持续了6年零1天，朝鲜战争持续了3年1个月零2天，越南战争持续了19年5个月零29天，伊拉克战争持续了8年8个月零28天，但他们喜欢说我承诺6周内击败伊朗，实际上，从军事角度来看，这比那快得多，但我不会让他们催促美国达成一项不如预期的协议。我读到假新闻说我正承受达成协议的“压力”。这不是真的！我没有任何压力，尽管这一切都会相对较快地发生！时间不是我的对手，唯一重要的是，在47年后，我们终于理顺了其他总统因缺乏勇气或远见而让其发生的关于伊朗的烂摊子。我们已经介入，事情会做得正确，我们不会让那些软弱可悲的民主党人——全是叛徒——得逞。他们多年来一直在谈论伊朗的危险，说必须采取行动，但现在因为是我在做这件事，他们就贬低我们军队和特朗普政府的成就。这正在完美执行，规模堪比委内瑞拉，只是一个更大、更复杂的操作。结果将是一样的。在我的第一个任期内，我建立了我们国家有史以来最伟大的军队，包括增加了太空军。在我的第二个任期内，我正在恰当且明智地利用我们的军队来解决那些理解力或能力远不如我的人留下的问题。让美国再次伟大！

text: U.S. Central Command Sailors conduct flight operations aboard USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) in the Red Sea, April 19. The Ford Carrier Strike Group is sailing in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2046276760174481746/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部水手于4月19日在红海的杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（CVN 78）上进行飞行作业。福特号航母打击群正在美国中央司令部责任区航行。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2046276760174481746/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Kan: A senior Israeli official said the United States and Iran are not close to an agreement, and that Israel is ready to return to war in Iran with American approval. “We are all waiting for Trump, but the sides are not close to agreement,” the official said. U.S. President Trump told PBS that a deal would be signed today in Pakistan, but warned that if the ceasefire expires tomorrow evening without an agreement, “many bombs will be launched.” Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said Americans seek Iranian submission, but Iran does not surrender to force. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 快讯 | Kan：一位以色列高级官员表示，美国和伊朗并未接近达成协议，以色列已准备好在获得美国批准的情况下重返伊朗战场。该官员说：“我们都在等待特朗普，但双方并未接近达成协议。”美国总统特朗普告诉PBS，协议将于今天在巴基斯坦签署，但警告称，如果停火协议在明天傍晚到期而未达成协议，“将发射许多炸弹”。伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安表示，美国人寻求伊朗屈服，但伊朗不会向武力投降。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Another Iran crash out from Donald. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德又一次让伊朗出局。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The DEAL that we are making with Iran will be FAR BETTER than the JCPOA, commonly referred to as “The Iran Nuclear Deal,” penned by Barack Hussein Obama and Sleepy Joe Biden, one of the Worst Deals ever made having to do with the Security of our Country. It was a guaranteed Road to a Nuclear Weapon, which will not, and cannot, happen with the Deal we’re working on. They actually gave $1.7 Billion Dollars in “GREEN” Cash, loaded into a Boeing 757, and flown to Iran for Iranian leadership to spend anyway they saw fit. He emptied out all of the Cash from Banks in D.C., Virginia, and Maryland. Those Bankers said they’ve never seen anything like it before. In addition, Hundreds of Billions of Dollars was paid to Iran. If I did not terminate that “Deal,” Nuclear Weapons would have been used on Israel, and all over the Middle East, including our cherished U.S. Military Bases. The Fake News, like Lightweight Washington Post “Journalist” David Ignatius, loves to talk about the JCPOA, knowing that it was DANGEROUS, and a Complete Embarrassment to our Country. If a Deal happens under “TRUMP,” it will guarantee Peace, Security, and Safety, not only for Israel and the Middle East, but for Europe, America, and everywhere else. It will be something that the entire World will be proud of, instead of the years of Embarrassment and Humiliation that we have been forced to suffer due to incompetent and cowardly leadership!
text_zh: 特朗普：我们正在与伊朗达成的协议将远好于JCPOA，即通常所说的“伊朗核协议”。该协议由巴拉克·侯赛因·奥巴马和瞌睡乔·拜登签署，是涉及我国安全的最糟糕的协议之一。它是一条通往核武器的保证之路，而我们正在制定的协议绝不会，也不可能发生这种情况。他们实际上给了17亿美元的“绿色”现金，装进一架波音757飞机，飞往伊朗，供伊朗领导层随意挥霍。他清空了华盛顿特区、弗吉尼亚州和马里兰州银行的所有现金。那些银行家说他们以前从未见过这样的事情。此外，还向伊朗支付了数千亿美元。如果我没有终止那个“协议”，核武器就会被用于以色列和整个中东，包括我们珍贵的美国军事基地。像华盛顿邮报的轻量级“记者”大卫·伊格内修斯这样的假新闻媒体，喜欢谈论JCPOA，却明知它是危险的，是对我们国家的彻底羞辱。如果协议在“特朗普”领导下达成，它将保证和平、安全和保障，不仅对以色列和中东，而且对欧洲、美国和其他任何地方。这将是全世界引以为豪的事情，而不是我们因无能和懦弱的领导而被迫忍受多年的尴尬和羞辱！

It will be something that the entire World will be proud of, instead of the years of Embarrassment and Humiliation that we have been forced to suffer due to incompetent and cowardly leadership! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitnes
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普：我们正在与伊朗达成的协议将远好于JCPOA，即通常所说的“伊朗核协议”。该协议由巴拉克·侯赛因·奥巴马和瞌睡乔·拜登签署，是涉及我国安全的最糟糕的协议之一。它是一条通往核武器的保证之路，而我们正在制定的协议绝不会，也不可能发生这种情况。他们实际上给了17亿美元的“绿色”现金，装进一架波音757飞机，飞往伊朗，供伊朗领导层随意挥霍。他清空了华盛顿特区、弗吉尼亚州和马里兰州银行的所有现金。那些银行家说他们以前从未见过这样的事情。此外，还向伊朗支付了数千亿美元。如果我没有终止那个“协议”，核武器就会被用于以色列和整个中东，包括我们珍贵的美国军事基地。像华盛顿邮报的轻量级“记者”大卫·伊格内修斯这样的假新闻媒体，喜欢谈论JCPOA，却明知它是危险的，是对我们国家的彻底羞辱。如果协议在“特朗普”领导下达成，它将保证和平、安全和保障，不仅对以色列和中东，而且对欧洲、美国和其他任何地方。这将是全世界引以为豪的事情，而不是我们因无能和懦弱的领导而被迫忍受多年的尴尬和羞辱！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitnes

text: 🇭🇺 🇮🇱 Peter Magyar, Hungary's incoming prime minister, says Hungary will comply with ICC arrest warrants — including the one for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, who is wanted for war crimes and crimes against humanity. Magyar has invited all heads of state and government he has spoken with by phone to Budapest for the 70th anniversary of the 1956 Hungarian uprising in October — Netanyahu included. But he was unambiguous: if Netanyahu sets foot on Hungarian soil, he will be arrested. "If a person subject to an arrest warrant enters a member state of the ICC, they must be taken into custody," Magyar told reporters. This reverses the policy of outgoing PM Viktor Orbán, who hosted Netanyahu in Budapest last year and subsequently announced Hungary's withdrawal from the ICC, effective June 2nd. Magyar says he intends to halt that withdrawal before the deadline. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇮🇱 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）表示，匈牙利将遵守国际刑事法院（ICC）的逮捕令——包括针对以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡的逮捕令，后者因战争罪和反人类罪被通缉。马扎尔已邀请所有他通过电话交谈过的国家元首和政府首脑前往布达佩斯，参加10月份纪念1956年匈牙利起义70周年的活动——其中包括内塔尼亚胡。但他明确表示：如果内塔尼亚胡踏上匈牙利领土，他将被逮捕。“如果受到逮捕令约束的人进入国际刑事法院成员国，他们必须被拘留，”马扎尔告诉记者。这扭转了即将离任的总理维克托·欧尔班的政策，欧尔班去年曾在布达佩斯接待过内塔尼亚胡，随后宣布匈牙利退出国际刑事法院，该决定于6月2日生效。马扎尔表示，他打算在截止日期前阻止这一退出。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ Herzog hands Milei a SHINY new medal in Jerusalem – the guy with the WIG is now Israel’s favorite. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇦🇷 ⚡️ 赫尔佐格在耶路撒冷向米莱颁发了一枚闪亮的新奖章——这个戴假发的家伙现在是以色列的最爱。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷NYT: Pakistani Interior Minister Naqvi said that “foolproof security arrangements” have been put in place for foreign delegations, as preparations for another round of negotiations with the U.S. are underway. Security is a key concern for Tehran…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Al Jazeera: A Pakistani source stated that the second round of negotiations between Iran and the United States is expected to begin tomorrow afternoon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷《纽约时报》：巴基斯坦内政部长纳克维表示，已为外国代表团采取了“万无一失的安全措施”，因为与美国进行新一轮谈判的准备工作正在进行中。安全是德黑兰的一个关键关切……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 半岛电视台：一位巴基斯坦消息人士称，伊朗与美国之间的第二轮谈判预计将于明天下午开始。@wfwitness

text: Iranian sailor Emad Hormozi’s body has been found in the Indian Ocean after about 45 days of being missing, following the sinking of the Iranian warship IRIS Dena by a U.S. Navy submarine.
text_zh: 伊朗海军舰艇IRIS Dena号被美国海军潜艇击沉约45天后，伊朗水手埃马德·霍尔莫兹（Emad Hormozi）的遗体在印度洋被发现。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 The commander of the IRGC’s Quds Force, Esmail Qaani, said after a visit to Baghdad that the formation of a government in Iraq is the right of the Iraqi people. “Iraq is too great for others – especially anti‑humanity criminals – to interfere in its…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kan : Iran’s Quds Force commander, Esmail Qaani – who has not been seen since the war began – has visited Baghdad to coordinate with pro‑Iranian Iraqi militias ahead of a possible resumption of hostilities with the United States. A senior Iraqi political source told the broadcaster that Qaani’s visit aimed to “align” the militias, which attacked U.S. targets in Iraq and the region during the war, and to ensure they are ready for the next round if Pakistani mediation fails. Qaani also sought to secure the appointment of a prime minister favourable to Tehran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇮🇶 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）在访问巴格达后表示，在伊拉克组建政府是伊拉克人民的权利。‘伊拉克太伟大了，不容许他人——尤其是反人类罪犯——干涉其……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 Kan：伊朗圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（自战争开始以来一直未露面）已访问巴格达，以便在可能与美国恢复敌对行动之前与亲伊朗的伊拉克民兵协调。一位伊拉克高级政治消息人士告诉该广播公司，卡尼此行的目的是“整合”那些在战争期间袭击伊拉克和该地区美国目标的民兵，并确保他们在巴基斯坦调解失败的情况下为下一轮冲突做好准备。卡尼还试图确保任命一位对德黑兰友好的总理。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel It's raining crude oil in the Russian city of Tuapse after Ukraine struck a major oil export terminal overnight. @Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046275810114375941/video/1 Ukrainian drones struck Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery overnight, igniting the tank farm. Russian officials reported one dead and one injured, marking the second hit on the Rosneft site in under a week. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 乌克兰连夜袭击了俄罗斯图阿普谢的一个主要石油出口码头后，该市下起了原油雨。@Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046275810114375941/video/1 乌克兰无人机连夜袭击了俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂，点燃了储油罐区。俄罗斯官员报告称有一人死亡、一人受伤，这是不到一周内该俄罗斯石油公司（Rosneft）基地第二次遇袭。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046152684453933312/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz An Iranian delegation is planning to arrive tomorrow in Pakistan's capital, Islamabad, despite sending mixed messages, according to two senior Iranian officials quoted by the NYT tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 据《纽约时报》援引两名伊朗高级官员的话称，尽管发出了相互矛盾的信息，但伊朗代表团计划明天抵达巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡。推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 📞 🇮🇷 Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov held a phone call with Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi, during which Lavrov emphasized the need to maintain the Iran–U.S. ceasefire and continue diplomatic efforts to end the conflict. ➡️ Araghchi confirmed Iran's readiness to do everything in its power to guarantee the safe and uninterrupted passage of Russian ships and cargo through the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 📞 🇮🇷 俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫与伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希通了电话，拉夫罗夫在通话中强调了维持伊美停火并继续通过外交努力结束冲突的必要性。➡️ 阿拉格希确认伊朗已准备好尽其所能，确保俄罗斯船只和货物安全、无阻碍地通过霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: OSINTtechnical It’s raining crude oil in the Russian Black Sea city of Tuapse after Ukrainian forces successfully struck a major oil export terminal tank farm overnight. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046274040172630355/video/1 Russia's Tuapse oil refinery and Black Sea oil export terminal tank farm continues to suffer a catastrophic fire this morning after an overnight Ukrainian drone raid. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046114169896701965/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在乌克兰军队连夜成功袭击了一个主要石油出口码头储油罐区后，俄罗斯黑海城市图阿普谢下起了原油雨。https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2046274040172630355/video/1 俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂和黑海石油出口码头储油罐区在连夜遭受乌克兰无人机袭击后，今晨继续发生灾难性火灾。https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2046114169896701965/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical 推文

text: Open Source Intel Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has dropped to a near standstill after claims it had reopened fell apart. Iran reversed course and reinstated restrictions. Only a handful of vessels have transited since. Oil and gas prices rebounding. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046273570016231545/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 在关于霍尔木兹海峡重新开放的说法破灭后，通过该海峡的交通几乎陷入停滞。伊朗改变了方针并恢复了限制措施。此后只有少数几艘船只通过。石油和天然气价格正在反弹。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046273570016231545/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Pakistani source to Al-Jazeera: The second round of negotiations between Washington and Tehran is expected to begin tomorrow afternoon. The Iranian delegation is expected to arrive in the morning, close to the arrival of the American delegation tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦消息人士向半岛电视台透露：华盛顿与德黑兰之间的第二轮谈判预计将于明天下午开始。伊朗代表团预计将于上午抵达，时间接近美国代表团的抵达时间。推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. will host a second round of Ambassador-level talks between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday at the State Department. - U.S. State Department tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国将于周四在国务院主办以色列与黎巴嫩之间第二轮大使级会谈。- 美国国务院推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 NYT: An Iranian delegation is preparing to travel to Islamabad on Tuesday for potential negotiations with the U.S., with Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf expected to attend. tweet

text: Open Source Intel IDF says its forces eliminated terrorists in three separate incidents in southern Lebanon today. All had violated the ceasefire and approached troops near Bint Jbeil and the Litani River. Airstrikes were called in shortly after detection. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军称，其部队今天在黎巴嫩南部三起独立事件中消灭了恐怖分子。所有人都违反了停火协议，并接近了宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）和利塔尼河（Litani River）附近的部队。在发现后不久即进行了空袭。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan : A senior Israeli official said the United States and Iran are not close to an agreement, and that Israel is ready to return to war in Iran with American approval. “We are all waiting for Trump, but the sides are not close to agreement,” the official said. U.S. President Trump told PBS that a deal would be signed today in Pakistan, but warned that if the ceasefire expires tomorrow evening without an agreement, “many bombs will be launched.” Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said Americans seek Iranian submission, but Iran does not surrender to force. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：一位以色列高级官员表示，美国和伊朗尚未达成协议，以色列已准备好在获得美国批准的情况下重返伊朗战场。该官员说：“我们都在等待特朗普，但双方并未接近达成协议。”美国总统特朗普告诉PBS，协议将于今天在巴基斯坦签署，但他警告说，如果停火协议在明天傍晚到期而未达成协议，“将投下许多炸弹”。伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安表示，美国人寻求伊朗屈服，但伊朗不会向武力投降。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: Pakistani Interior Minister Naqvi said that “foolproof security arrangements” have been put in place for foreign delegations, as preparations for another round of negotiations with the U.S. are underway. Security is a key concern for Tehran, following the killing of several Iranian officials in recent U.S. and Israeli strikes. The Serena Hotel in Islamabad, which hosted the first round of talks earlier this month, has reportedly been cleared of guests, while thousands of additional security personnel have been deployed across the city. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：巴基斯坦内政部长纳克维表示，已为外国代表团采取了“万无一失的安全措施”，因为与美国的另一轮谈判准备工作正在进行中。在几名伊朗官员在最近的美国和以色列袭击中丧生后，安全是德黑兰的一个关键关切。据报道，本月初主办第一轮会谈的伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店（Serena Hotel）已清空了客人，同时数千名额外的安全人员已部署在整个城市。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Japan Rejects Takaichi’s War Path: 36,000 Demand Peace with Iran Around 36,000 protesters rallied outside Japan’s parliament on April 19. Demonstrator demanding "No to War," "Protection of Article 9," and the resignation of hard-line conservative Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi. Japanese firmly rejected any involvement in the U.S.-Israeli conflict against Iran and closer ties with Trump. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 日本拒绝高市早苗的战争路线：36,000人要求与伊朗和平。4月19日，约36,000名抗议者在日本国会外集会。示威者要求“拒绝战争”、“保护第9条”以及强硬派保守党首相高市早苗辞职。日本人坚决拒绝参与美以针对伊朗的冲突，并拒绝与特朗普建立更紧密的关系。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Iran is considering participating in peace talks with the US in Pakistan, Reuters correspondent Parisa Hafezi reported, citing a senior Iranian official — though a final decision has not yet been made. Al Jazeera, citing a Pakistani source, reports that a second round of US-Iran negotiations is expected to take place on Tuesday afternoon, with both delegations arriving in the morning. Pakistani officials say preparations are already underway. Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi confirmed that "foolproof security arrangements have been made for foreign delegations" — a key concern for Tehran, given that numerous Iranian officials have been killed in US and Israeli strikes. The Serena Hotel in Islamabad, which hosted the first round earlier this month, has been cleared of guests, and thousands of additional security personnel have been deployed across the city. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据路透社记者帕里萨·哈菲兹（Parisa Hafezi）援引一位伊朗高级官员的话报道，伊朗正在考虑参加在巴基斯坦举行的美伊和平谈判——尽管尚未做出最终决定。半岛电视台援引一位巴基斯坦消息人士的话报道称，美伊第二轮谈判预计将于周二下午举行，双方代表团将于上午抵达。巴基斯坦官员表示，准备工作已经在进行中。内政部长莫辛·纳克维（Mohsin Naqvi）证实，“已为外国代表团采取了万无一失的安全措施”——鉴于许多伊朗官员在美以袭击中丧生，这是德黑兰的一个关键关切。本月初主办第一轮会谈的伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店已清空了客人，数千名额外的安全人员已部署在整个城市。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. Vice President Vance is expected to depart Washington on Tuesday for Pakistan to participate in the latest round of talks with Iran. A second round of negotiations between U.S. and Iranian delegations is currently planned for Wednesday in Islamabad, though officials cautioned the situation remains fluid amid ongoing tensions and public rhetoric. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：美国副总统万斯预计将于周二离开华盛顿前往巴基斯坦，参加与伊朗的最新一轮会谈。目前计划于周三在伊斯兰堡举行美伊代表团之间的第二轮谈判，但官员们提醒称，在持续的紧张局势和公开言论中，局势仍然不稳定。 @wfwitness
